expressions.label: state
expressions.justification: Describes a mode of operation of the machine.

expressions.text: alarms and messages with stop at end of cycle
expressions.label: alarm type
expressions.justification: Defines a category of alarms that trigger a stop at cycle end.

expressions.label: state
expressions.justification: Indicates the machine's operational state when the alarm triggers.

expressions.label: action
expressions.justification: Represents the function that initiates the machine cycle.

expressions.label: message type
expressions.justification: Specifies a type of message that does not alter machine state.

expressions.label: purpose
expressions.justification: Describes the intended effect of read-only messages.

expressions.text: with stop at end of cycle
expressions.label: relation-bearing expression
expressions.justification: Links alarms/messages to the stop action.

expressions.label: relation-bearing expression
expressions.justification: Specifies the condition under which the machine stops.

expressions.text: used to draw the operator's attention
expressions.label: relation-bearing expression
expressions.justification: Indicates the purpose of read-only messages.
